page_content:
EDUC760 The Human Dimension in Administration (4 Credits) Course focuses on theory, research ﬁndings, and current practices in managing human resources in educational organizations. Issues related to performance evaluations, professional development, and legal and ethical standards are addressed. Restriction: Permission of EDUC-College of Education. Credit Only Granted for: EDUC760 or EDHI760. Formerly: EDHI760.

EDUC767 Seminar on School District Leadership (4 Credits) Examination of theory and research related to school district leadership with focus on improvement sciences. Course uses improvement science model to understand organizational, political, community, instructional problems of practice. Restriction: Permission of EDUC-College of Education. Credit Only Granted for: EDUC767 or EDHI767. Formerly: EDHI767.

625

626

EMBA - Executive MBA Program

EDUC770 System Innovation and Transformation (4 Credits) Course is designed to provide EdD students understanding how complex systems improve performance and connect educational and social objectives to goals of innovation and efﬁciency. Restriction: Permission of EDUC-College of Education. Credit Only Granted for: EDUC769, EDHI788M, or EDUC770. Formerly: EDHI788M.
